name_en: 🖤Chanel✨Hot Metal CF Mini Flap AS1787. Extra gold ball on the chain adds a perfect touch. Retro and stylish with adjustable chain length. Can be worn as a waist bag or crossbody. Exquisite and perfect💕 Love it🥰🥰Global sell-out. Size:20cm
